VCMoE 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Gaussian simulation tutorial

VCMoE

VCMoE fits varying-coefficient mixture-of-experts models for Gaussian, Binomial, and Negative-Binomial responses.

Installation 

install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("qc-zhao/Varying-Coefficient-Mixture-of-Experts-Model")

Documentation

A user guide, Gaussian simulation tutorial, and function reference are available at:

https://qc-zhao.github.io/Varying-Coefficient-Mixture-of-Experts-Model/

Citation

Please cite:

Zhao Q, Greenwood CMT, Zhang Q. Varying-Coefficient Mixture of Experts Model. arXiv:2601.01699. https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.01699
